courseDetails.title: Strategic AI Leadership for Digital Transformation
courseDetails.shortDescription: Use generative AI to design business strategy, lead change management initiatives and drive sustainable transformation
courseDetails.longDescription:
The Strategic AI Leadership for Digital Transformation specialization is designed for C-suite executives, founders, and senior leaders looking to drive digital transformation through AI leadership. This program equips you with the knowledge and tools required to lead enterprise-wide AI transformation and build a robust AI strategy framework aligned with your business goals.

In today’s rapidly evolving landscape, AI for enterprise transformation is no longer optional. Leaders must understand how AI can transform your organization, enhance decision-making, and create sustainable competitive advantage. This course provides a practical approach to AI strategy and transformation, helping you move from traditional business strategy to an integrated AI strategy roadmap.

You will explore how leading AI tools such as ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, and Grok support leadership development, enabling smarter decision-making, improved communication, and operational efficiency. The program paves the path for you to develop critical leadership skills required to guide teams through AI-driven digital transformation.

Throughout the specialization, you will engage with real-world frameworks, case studies, and hands-on exercises focused on AI strategy planning, governance, and digital transformation solutions. You will also learn how AI tools for enterprise transformation can be applied across functions including marketing, operations, supply chain, and finance.

A key focus of this course is change management in digital transformation. You will learn how to design and implement effective change management strategies, apply AI-driven change management techniques, and manage organizational transitions using structured change management frameworks. The program also addresses change management for AI transformation, ensuring that your initiatives are successfully adopted across teams.

You will gain insights into the role of AI in organizational change management. This enables you to lead transformation initiatives with confidence, clarity, and measurable impact.

By combining AI leadership, strategic planning, and digital transformation strategy, this specialization prepares you to:

  • Develop and execute a comprehensive AI transformation roadmap for enterprises

  • Align AI strategy with business goals for sustainable growth and development

  • Implement enterprise-wide AI solutions for strategic transformation

  • Drive innovation across digital products and business functions

  • Lead high-impact AI transformation for enterprises

Upon completion, you will have a personalized AI strategy blueprint, along with a portfolio of real-world AI use cases tailored to your organization. You will be equipped to lead AI-powered digital transformation, whether in a global enterprise or a growing startup.

This program is ideal for leaders seeking to stay ahead of AI trends, and build the capabilities needed to lead in the age of artificial intelligence and informed decision making.

If you are ready to move beyond experimentation and lead meaningful digital transformation, this course provides the strategic clarity and practical direction to do so.
targetAudiences: This course is designed for C-suite executives, senior leaders, and decision-makers driving AI leadership and digital transformation strategy across their organizations. It is particularly valuable for leaders seeking to understand AI for enterprise transformation and build a strong AI strategy framework aligned with business goals.

Innovation and strategy professionals will gain practical insights into integrating artificial intelligence into enterprise-wide initiatives. This includes those working on AI transformation roadmaps for enterprises and implementing enterprise-wide AI solutions for strategic digital transformation.

Business unit leaders focused on operational excellence, customer experience, and digital products will benefit from learning how AI tools for digital transformation can improve efficiency across functions such as marketing, operations, supply chain, and finance.

courseDetails.title: Mental de Champion transformer tes problèmes en opportunités
courseDetails.shortDescription: Libère-toi du cycle infernal des pensées négatives et transforme ta relation aux défis de la vie
courseDetails.longDescription:
Tu passes tes journées à ruminer tes problèmes ? Tu te sens complètement perdu quand quelque chose d'imprévu arrive ? Cette formation de plus d'une heure vingt va carrément changer ta façon de voir et de gérer les galères du quotidien.

Reprends le contrôle de ton mental et stop avec ces pensées pourries qui te bouffent la tête. Avec les techniques anti-rumination que tu vas apprendre, fini de tourner en boucle dans ta tête - tu vas enfin savoir comment couper court à tout ça.

Change ta façon de voir les choses et tu verras comme ta vie va se transformer. Au lieu de subir ce qui t'arrive, tu vas découvrir comment regarder les événements sous un autre angle pour y trouver de la force et des opportunités. Tu vas commencer à voir des solutions partout où tu ne voyais que des murs.

Apprends à gérer ce qui te tombe dessus sans paniquer ni te laisser déstabiliser. Tu vas développer des réflexes mentaux qui te permettront de transformer n'importe quel obstacle en quelque chose de positif pour toi.

Dans cette formation, je t'explique tout étape par étape, face caméra, comme si on était ensemble. Chaque concept est accompagné d'exemples concrets que tu peux appliquer dès maintenant dans ta vie.

Tu découvriras aussi pourquoi s'inquiéter ne sert strictement à rien et comment les gens qui réussissent gèrent vraiment leurs problèmes. Tu auras accès à des vidéos sur le bonheur authentique et ce qui fait qu'on peut vraiment profiter de la vie.

Après cette formation, tu ne subiras plus tes problèmes comme avant. Tu auras enfin tout ce qu'il faut pour reprendre le contrôle complet de ton mental.
targetAudiences: Tu rumines constamment - Tu passes tes nuits à ressasser tes problèmes, à analyser chaque situation sous tous les angles sans jamais trouver de solution
Tu te sens submergé(e) par les imprévus - Les changements soudains te paralysent et tu as l'impression de subir ta vie plutôt que de la diriger
Tu veux reprendre le contrôle de ton mental - Tu es fatigué(e) de tes pensées négatives automatiques et tu cherches des outils concrets pour changer ta perception
Tu aspires à une vision de vie plus large - Tu sens que tu te limites dans tes projets et tes ambitions à cause de tes peurs et de ton pessimisme
Tu cherches des résultats rapides et durables - Tu veux une méthode pratique, pas de la théorie abstraite, quelque chose que tu peux appliquer dès ce soir

courseDetails.title: U.S. Residential Real Estate & Mortgage Business 2026
courseDetails.shortDescription: Complete training: property underwriting, loan processing, financial review & mortgage operations mastery
courseDetails.longDescription:
Ever wondered what really happens behind the scenes of a mortgage loan process? From application to underwriting, servicing, and even foreclosure, this course provides a complete view of the modern U.S. residential mortgage business, real estate financing, and property transactions.

This comprehensive program demystifies the mortgage business by guiding learners through the full lifecycle of a home loan from origination to mortgage-backed securitization. Designed with real-world relevance, the course reflects how today’s US mortgage and real estate markets operate, incorporating updated data, practical examples, and current lending practices.

You will explore core concepts such as mortgage underwriting, loan structures, credit and risk analysis, regulatory frameworks, foreclosure strategies, servicing, and the broader mortgage-backed securities market. The course also explains what is a mortgage-backed security, how residential mortgage-backed securities are structured, and how they are priced, traded, and evaluated in terms of risk and return.

Unlike traditional theory-heavy programs, this course emphasizes practical understanding thereby helping you grasp how mortgage-backed securities work, the risks with mortgage-backed securities, and the return on mortgage-backed securities from both lender and investor perspectives. You will also gain insights into mortgage-backed securities investment, performance, and pricing dynamics.

By the end of the course, you will not only understand the mortgage in business and property financing landscape but also develop the analytical skills required to evaluate loans, assess borrower risk, and understand securitized mortgage structures in the real world.

This course follows microlearning best practices, with each lesson structured into focused 7–10 minute videos to enhance retention and engagement.


Course Outline

Module 1: Foundations of U.S. Residential Mortgage Business

  • Course Welcome

  • Industry Overview – History, Scope, and Mortgage Business Process

  • Residential Property Types and Real Estate Segments

  • Key Players in the Mortgage and Real Estate Ecosystem

  • Loan Types: Fixed, Adjustable (ARM), FHA, VA, Conforming & Non-Conforming

  • ARM Mechanics: Margins, Indexes, and Rate Caps

Module 2: Terms, Math & Risk Fundamentals

  • Mortgage Terms, Conditions, Prepayment, and Default

  • Mortgage Math: Payments, Amortization, and Pricing

  • Loan Features: Balloon Loans, Interest-Only, Construction Loans

  • Second Mortgages, HELOCs, and Lien Structures

  • Risk Analysis in Mortgage Underwriting

  • Consumer and Lender Mortgage Lifecycle

  • Reverse Mortgages and Risk Considerations

Module 3: Regulation, Distress & Market Landscape

  • Federal, State, and Local Mortgage Regulations

  • Foreclosure Avoidance and Loss Mitigation Strategies

  • Market Structure of the US Mortgage and Real Estate Market

  • Refinancing Strategies and Borrower Scenarios

Module 4: Mortgage Analysis & Appraisal Techniques

  • Borrower Analysis: Income, Ratios, and Credit Evaluation

  • Credit Report Analysis and Interpretation

  • Key Metrics: LTV, DTI, and Risk Layering in Underwriting

  • Property Appraisal Methods and Valuation Techniques

  • Title, Insurance, and Real Estate Transaction Considerations

Module 5: Servicing, Securitization & Wrap-Up

  • Loan Servicing: Payment Collection, Escrow, Monitoring

  • Introduction to Mortgage-Backed Securitization

  • Issuer and Investor Perspectives in the Mortgage-Backed Securities Market

  • Mortgage-Backed Securities Lifecycle and Ratings

  • Capstone: Real-World Mortgage Case Simulation


What Makes This Course Valuable

  • End-to-end understanding of the mortgage loan process and real estate financing

  • Practical insights into mortgage underwriting, borrower risk, and loan structuring

  • Deep dive into mortgage-backed securities, including structure, pricing, performance, and risks

  • Real-world perspective on property markets, lending, and securitization

  • Strong foundation for careers in mortgage business, real estate, banking, and financial services
targetAudiences: This course is suitable for learners at all levels who want to build a strong understanding of the U.S. residential mortgage business, real estate, and property financing. It is ideal for professionals and aspiring learners interested in mortgage underwriting, the mortgage loan process, and mortgage-backed securities.

courseDetails.title: The Securities Trade Lifecycle: Front, Middle & Back-Office
courseDetails.shortDescription: Definitive Trade Lifecycle Guide | Trade Execution | Capture | Enrichment | Confirmation | Settlement | Reconciliation
courseDetails.longDescription:
The securities trade lifecycle involves all the business, operational and technological steps involved in a capital markets "trade" (buying or selling of a financial instrument), from the moment an "order" is received through the "execution" of the trade through its "settlement." 

In this course, you will learn everything you need to know from the World's leading securities operations expert, Mike Simmons.  Mike takes you behind the scenes to understand precisely how investment and banking operations work in settling securities.  At the end of the course, you will have a solid understanding of the detailed steps involved in a trade from the back office operations point of view. Some of the many things covered in this course include discussion of:


  1. Order initiation and delivery (Front office function)

  2. Risk management and order routing (middle office function)

  3. Order matching and conversion into trade (front office function)

  4. Affirmation and confirmation (back office function)

  5. Clearing and Settlement (back office function)

Who is Mike?  He has managed large-scale security operations for some of the major money center banks and had had decades of experience in exactly how securities and risk management operations work in practice. 

More about this course and Starweaver

This course is led by a seasoned financial industry practitioner and executive in operations executive with many years of hands-on, in-the-trenches capital markets work. Your instructor is the leading expert on this subject globally. He has conducted over 500 training courses in locations including the UK, US, Netherlands, Germany, Switzerland, UAE, Japan, India, Australia, Singapore, Hong Kong, and Russia. He is also the author of three well-regarded industry books:


  • Securities Operations: A Guide to Trade and Position Management

  • Corporate Actions: A Guide to Securities Event Management

  • Collateral Management: A Guide to Mitigating Counterparty Risk

As a long-standing veteran of large financial institutions, Mike has over 20 years of experience training and developing teams of people who worked for him inside those organizations, as well as many others in buy-side and sell-side firms, central securities depositories (CSDs) and custodians, central banks, management consultancies and software and systems providers

The course has been designed, produced and delivered by Starweaver. Starweaver is one of the most highly regarded, well-established training providers in the World, providing training courses to many of the leading financial institutions and technology companies, including:

Ahli United Bank; Mashreqbank; American Express; ANZ Bank; ATT; Banco Votorantim; Bank of America; Bank of America Global Markets; Bank of America Private Bank; Barclay Bank; BMO Financial Group; BMO Financial Services; BNP Paribas; Boeing; Cigna; Citibank; Cognizant; Commerzbank; Credit Lyonnais/Calyon; Electrosonic; Farm Credit Administration; Fifth Third Bank; GENPACT; GEP Software; GLG Group; Hartford; HCL; HCL; Helaba; HSBC; HSBC Corporate Bank; HSBC India; HSBC Private Bank; Legal & General; National Australia Bank; Nomura Securities; PNC Financial Services Group; Quintiles; RAK Bank; Regions Bank; Royal Bank of Canada; Royal Bank of Scotland; Santander Corporate Bank; Tata Consultancy Services; Union Bank; ValueMomentum; Wells Fargo; Wells Fargo India Solutions; Westpac Corporate Bank; Wipro; and, many others.

courseDetails.title: Data to Insight: Storytelling for Finance Leaders

courseDetails.longDescription:

In today’s data-driven world, successful financial advisors and investment professionals go beyond numbers. They leverage the power of data visualisation and data storytelling to communicate insights that inspire action and drive better financial decisions.

This course introduces you to data storytelling: communicating data insights effectively, helping you transform financial analysis into clear, engaging, and actionable narratives. Data Storytelling Foundations

Build a strong foundation in data storytelling and visualisation, learning key principles, data storytelling best practices, and storytelling techniques in data visualisation. You will develop the ability to turn financial insights into compelling narratives that resonate with clients.

Data Analysis and Visualisation Skills

Gain hands-on experience with data visualisation using Python, applying data visualisation methods and techniques to analyse, prepare, and present financial data. You will also explore how generative AI can support code creation and enhance data visualisation analysis.

The Power of Data Visualisation (Sankey Diagrams)

Understand the power of data visualisation through Sankey diagrams, a powerful method for visualising flow and relationships. You will learn how to structure financial data, create impactful data visualisation examples, and use them as a foundation for storytelling.

Story Structure and Financial Narratives

Learn how to design structured narratives using proven storytelling frameworks. By combining insights from data visualisation and reporting with narrative techniques, you will create compelling financial stories that improve clarity and engagement.

  • Apply storytelling with data principles to make your insights more engaging and actionable

  • Use data visualisation techniques to uncover patterns, relationships, and flow in financial data

  • Leverage data visualisation tools and Python to create impactful visuals

This course is designed for financial advisors, investment experts, and individual investors who want to enhance their communication through data storytelling and data visualisation in business analytics.

It is also ideal for quantitative analysts, business analysts, and operations research professionals who want to improve data visualisation and reporting and apply effective storytelling with data techniques.

Whether you are advising clients or presenting to stakeholders, this course will help you apply data storytelling best practices to communicate insights more effectively, drive decisions, and build stronger engagement.


Learning Outcomes

By the end of this course, you will be able to:

  • Define advisory objectives using principles of data storytelling and client-focused communication

  • Apply data visualisation using Python to create and interpret Sankey diagrams and other visuals

  • Develop compelling narratives using data storytelling and visualisation techniques

  • Present financial insights using effective storytelling with data and communication strategies
targetAudiences: This course is designed for financial advisors, investment experts, and individual investors who want to enhance their ability to communicate insights through data storytelling and data visualization using Python. courseDetails.title: Advanced Techniques in Threat Intelligence & Reporting

courseDetails.title: Interest Rate Swaps: Pricing, Risk & Hedging Made Simple
courseDetails.shortDescription: Learn how interest rate swaps work, swap rates, valuation, and real-world hedging strategies in financial markets
courseDetails.longDescription:
Dive into the world of interest rate swaps (IRS) - one of the most widely used interest rate derivatives in modern capital markets. This comprehensive course provides a clear and practical understanding of what an interest rate swap is, how it works, and how it is applied in real-world financial risk management.

You will begin with the fundamentals, exploring interest rate swaps explained in simple terms, including the structure of fixed-to-floating and floating-to-fixed swaps. The course answers key questions such as what an interest rate swap (IRS) is and how interest rate swaps work, helping you build a strong conceptual foundation.

As you progress, you will explore different types of swaps, including basis swaps, and understand how various interest rate swaps are structured and used in practice. The program also covers practical applications such as managing floating rate liabilities and using swaps for risk management and hedging strategies.

This program is designed to build from foundational concepts to a practical understanding of how interest rate swaps work in real-world environments. In today’s rapidly evolving threat landscape, endpoint security management has become the front line of modern cybersecurity. Whether protecting laptops, servers, cloud workloads, or mobile devices, every endpoint represents a potential entry point into critical systems. Understanding what endpoint security management is and why endpoint security management is important is essential for safeguarding organizational assets.

Cybercriminals actively target endpoints, making effective endpoint management and security a core requirement for protecting sensitive data and maintaining operational integrity.

This course gives you a full-stack view of endpoint security management, taking you beyond basic antivirus into the world of EDR, Zero Trust, and Insider Threat defense, all explained in a practical, structured, and beginner-friendly way.


What Makes This Course Different?

This is not a passive, theory-only cybersecurity course.

Instead, you’ll gain a practical understanding of endpoint security and management through real-world scenarios and hands-on labs using lightweight, open-source tools in virtual machines. This approach allows you to learn endpoint security techniques without relying on expensive enterprise platforms.

The course mirrors real workflows used by SOC analysts, system administrators, red/blue teamers, and cybersecurity engineers. Whether you're starting out or advancing your skills, you’ll build a complete understanding of how endpoint management security works in real environments.


What Problem Does This Course Solve?

Many learners struggle with applying theory to real-world defense. This course bridges that gap by helping you:

  • Understand why endpoints are primary attack targets

  • Build from fundamentals to threat detection

  • Analyze real-world alerts and tools used by defenders

  • Deploy simple Zero Trust architectures with free tools.

  • Correlate logs, behaviors, and attack patterns like a professional using threat detection techniques


What You’ll Learn

In this course, you will develop the skills to:

  • Build and secure endpoint architectures using endpoint security management principles

  • Use Sysmon to monitor and detect endpoint threats.

  • Sysmon – for endpoint telemetry

  • CIS-CAT Lite – for security baseline assessments

  • Sigma – for writing detection rules

  • Event Viewer & PowerShell – for real-time analysis

These tools reflect real-world workflows of a SOC analyst or endpoint security manager.


What This Course Will Help You Do

  • Land an entry-level SOC analyst or blue team job.

This course provides a comprehensive introduction to financial math, covering essential calculations and concepts used by professionals in capital markets and quantitative finance. You will learn how to calculate interest rates, compound rates, bond prices, bond yields, and interest yields, all of which are fundamental to fixed income investments and financial decision-making.

The program explores the time value of money, a core principle in finance, and demonstrates how it applies to bond valuation, pricing, and return calculations across a wide range of fixed income instruments (bonds). These concepts are widely used in bond investing, bond trading, and fixed income portfolio management.

You will gain a clear understanding of what bonds are, the types of bonds, and how fixed income securities function within the broader bond market. The course also explains how to invest in fixed income securities, evaluate bond prices, and analyze returns across different fixed income assets.

In addition, the course introduces concepts used in financial derivatives, helping you understand how pricing, yields, and rates are applied in real-world financial markets.

Course Structure

This course consists of 15 modules, organized into 3 sections:

  • Interest Rate Conventions and Time Value of Money

  • Debt Security Pricing and Bond Valuation

  • Bond Yields, Interest Yields, and Rates of Return

Using business communication examples, you will learn to communicate complex ideas with precision and clarity across formats such as reports, emails, and technical documentation. You will also examine how technology is improving communication in business, and how modern business communication solutions can enhance effectiveness.

A central component of the specialisation is data storytelling, a critical skill for communicating insights in a data-driven environment. You will learn what data storytelling is, why data storytelling is important, and how it integrates with data visualisation techniques to support decision-making. Through hands-on application of data visualisation tools, you will explore data visualisation examples and reporting frameworks. The program also emphasises visual storytelling through data, enabling you to present insights in a clear, structured, and impactful manner.

The curriculum combines conceptual understanding with practical application through real-world scenarios, case studies, and guided exercises. You will learn how communication operates in dynamic environments and how to apply these skills to leadership, collaboration, and strategic execution.

This specialisation is designed for professionals across functions, including sales, HR, marketing, leadership, and business development, who aim to strengthen their communication capabilities and enhance their impact.

By the end of the program, you will be able to:

courseDetails.title: Building Estimation Masterclass: G+11 High-Rise Projects
courseDetails.shortDescription: Learn Quantity Surveying, Building Estimation, BOQ, Rate Analysis & BBS for G+11 High-Rise Projects with Practical Case
courseDetails.longDescription:
Quantity Surveying is one of the most in-demand skills in the construction industry, and this course is designed to give you complete practical training with a real G+11 multistory building project. Unlike other courses that focus only on theory, here you will learn by doing- step by step, from drawings to BOQ, estimation, and billing.


We begin with the fundamentals of Quantity Surveying, Estimation, and Costing in high-rise buildings. You will learn how to read architectural and structural drawings, extract quantities, and calculate materials required for each stage of construction including earthwork, foundations, columns, beams, slabs, walls, plaster, flooring, and finishing works.


The course also covers Bar Bending Schedule (BBS) preparation with real reinforcement examples, and Rate Analysis for major construction items such as RCC, steel, masonry, plaster, and finishing. You will gain hands-on skills to prepare a Bill of Quantities (BOQ) in Excel, perform cost estimation, and manage tendering, contracts, and billing

processes.

In addition, you will learn the professional methods of cost control, valuation, and variation orders used in real projects. The entire course is structured around a case study of a G+11 multistory building, ensuring that every concept is applied practically.


By the end of this course, you will be able to confidently prepare estimates, BBS, BOQ, rate analysis, and final billing for multistory projects-skills that make you job-ready for roles such as Quantity Surveyor, Billing Engineer, or Cost Estimator in the construction industry.

This course is ideal for civil engineering students, fresh graduates, site engineers, and professionals who want to upgrade their knowledge with real project-based training.

courseDetails.title: Certificate in Occupational Therapy (Accredited Course)
courseDetails.shortDescription: A Conceptual Course for Freshers | Include Therapeutic Approaches, CBT, Sensory Integration Techniques & 4-S Model
courseDetails.longDescription:
Do you love helping people in achieving their greatest potential? Your passion can become a lucrative career. Indeed! You heard right! Working as an occupational therapist allows you to assist people in becoming independent.

Our Occupational Therapy Certification course is designed to help you master the skills necessary to become a professional occupational therapist. A professional occupational therapist supports people in overcoming different life challenges.

This course starts with an introductory module that will provide you with an overview of occupational therapy (OT), including its history, the various professions that occupational therapists might work in, and its significance in the healthcare industry. Besides, we will discuss the skills and training you need to have to be a successful occupational therapist.

As you advance through the modules, you will understand the tactics you should use while working with different age groups, such as elderly people and children. You will also get solid skills working with children with developmental disabilities.

Occupational therapists need to be skilled in therapeutic approaches and techniques, which is why we will train you in cognitive behavioral therapy (CBT), sensory integration techniques, and other approaches. Additionally, we will guide you in giving therapy to people suffering from severe depression so that they can regain their lost confidence.

Furthermore, you will explore tactics for coping with life changes, as transitions in life are inevitable. We will guide you on the 4-S model, social support networks, and coping strategies to overcome the transitional situation and restore resilience and growth.

This is not the end, we will guide you to develop your career in occupational therapy through lifelong learning and self-development. In that context, we will share some practical knowledge you need to possess. Moreover, we will aware you of the legal and ethical responsibilities essential for occupational therapy by ensuring your client's privacy and healthcare policies.

Dive into this course to discover more about your career options as an occupational therapist and how you may make a meaningful impact in people's lives through your passion.


Enroll Now!

This course comes with the following Sections:


  1. Introduction to Occupational Therapy: You will explore occupational therapy in detail in this section of the course, including its background and significance in the healthcare sector. In addition to learning the functions of occupational therapy, you will look into multiple fields and possible difficulties that an occupational therapist may encounter.

  2. Essential Knowledge & Skills: This part of our course will teach you about the set of skills and training required to work as an occupational therapist. We will also be aware of your client's rights and how you act accordingly.

  3. Working with Different Age Groups: Here you will know how to apply occupational therapy in different conditions, and effectively work with different age groups, as different age groups have different requirements.

  4. Therapeutic Approaches and Techniques: Throughout this course section, we discuss the exclusive therapeutic approach and techniques used in occupational therapy, including Cognitive Behavioral Therapy (CBT), Sensory Integration Techniques, and how assistive technology is used during therapy.

  5. Mental Health and Occupational Therapy: In this section of our occupational therapy course, you will learn how to deal with clients who are struggling with mental health disorders. You will get training on how to help your client restore confidence by overcoming depression and stress-related disorders.

  6. Life Events, Transition, and Loss: people encounter different types of transition or unwanted events in life that leave them devastated. In this part of our course, you will learn the coping strategies that should be applied to cope with traumas and start afresh.

  7. Professional and Personal Development: This section will focus on the tactics and training that occupational therapists should pursue to stay up-to-date in the field, as well as how to advance their careers. We will also talk about an occupational therapist's professional conduct and code of ethics.

  8. Conceptual Foundations in Practice: This section of the course will help you develop the therapeutic reasoning, critical thinking, and portfolio-building skills necessary for successful occupational therapy practice.

  9. Legislation and Advocacy: We will discuss the legal responsibilities, health policies, and advocacy strategies to support occupational therapy services. Furthermore, we will guide you on the importance of maintaining client’s privacy.

  10. Career Development and Alternative Paths: This section will provide some unique insights into occupational therapy leadership careers, professional development strategies, and the various career paths open to occupational therapists.
targetAudiences: Anyone interested in learning about occupational therapy
Healthcare professionals looking to expand their knowledge in therapeutic interventions.
Individuals who are passionate about working with different age groups, helping overcome life challenges.

Tu te sens parfois submergé par les moments difficiles au travail ? Tu cherches à retrouver cette étincelle qui te faisait vibrer chaque matin ? Ce cours est fait pour toi.

Rééquilibrage d'activité : Découvre comment recadrer tes moments durs avec des moments joyeux. Mauvaise journée au bureau ? Tu apprendras à planifier stratégiquement des activités plaisantes (massage, cinéma, restaurant) pour rééquilibrer ton état émotionnel et maintenir ton bien-être.

Tire la chasse des pensées négatives : Libère-toi de ce qui ne te procure pas de plaisir. Tu vas apprendre à identifier et éliminer les idées toxiques qui sabotent ton bonheur.

courseDetails.title: Red Team Mastery: Advanced Offensive Security
courseDetails.shortDescription: Learn red teaming basics to advanced techniques, including lab setup, hacking networks, and exploiting systems effective
courseDetails.longDescription:
Are you ready to master advanced offensive security? This course is designed to take you through the complete red teaming process, from setting up a lab to carrying out real-world attacks.

You’ll learn how to:

  • Set up a virtual lab environment with internal and external networks.

  • Conduct effective reconnaissance and gather valuable information about your targets.

  • Exploit vulnerabilities in networks, systems, and web servers.

  • Use advanced tools and techniques for post-exploitation and lateral movement.

  • Understand how Active Directory works and how attackers exploit it.

The course includes detailed explanations of red team tactics, methods to bypass security defenses, and approaches for stealth operations. Through hands-on labs and step-by-step guides, you’ll gain the ability to think critically, solve problems, and adapt to new challenges.

This course is for beginners and professionals who want to improve their skills in ethical hacking and red teaming. No prior experience in red teaming is required. Just bring your passion for cybersecurity and a computer capable of running virtual machines!

With step-by-step instructions, practical labs, and hands-on exercises, you’ll gain the knowledge and skills to think like an attacker and protect against real-world threats. Enroll now and start your journey toward becoming a red team expert!

courseDetails.title: Introducción a Bootstrap 5

Al final el curso podrás:

  • Aprender las diferencias de tipografía y de estilo entre HTML y Bootstrap 5 en etiquetas como abbr, mark, pre, kdb o blockquote.

  • Aprender a crear listas agrupadas, paneles y grupos de paneles, menús dropdown, listas colapsables, crear un acordeón, menú de tabuladores, menú de píldoras, menús verticales, así como tabuladores y píldoras centradas en Bootstrap.

  • Crear barras de navegación normales y en colores invertidos, añadir un dropdown, crear opciones a la derecha e izquierda de la barra, agregar botones, un formulario y hacer una barra colapsable para un dispositivo pequeño.

courseDetails.title: Migra un Sitio Web de WordPress a otro Dominio o Hosting
courseDetails.shortDescription: Migra un sitio web de WordPress a otro dominio o hosting, sin saber de programación, de forma fácil y simple.
courseDetails.longDescription:
¿DESEAS APRENDER A MIGRAR UN SITIO WEB DE WORDPRESS A OTRO DOMINIO O HOSTING?


Únete a nuestro curso para mostrarte cómo migrar un sitio web de WordPress completo a otro dominio o hosting, para dicho proceso, podemos utilizar uno de estos dos plugins: All in One WP Migration o SiteGround Migrator.


All in One WP Migration es un plugin que facilita la migración de un sitio hecho en WordPress de forma rápida y sencilla.


Permite exportar todo el contenido como entradas, post, plugins, base de datos, imágenes, temas, etc.


Para realizar este proceso no necesitas ningún tipo de conocimiento técnico ni de programación, ya que se realiza de una forma fácil y veloz.


Para migrar un sitio web en WordPress con el plugin All in One WP Migration, básicamente hay que realizar los siguientes pasos:

  • Instalar el plugin All-in-One WP Migration.

  • Dar clic al botón de exportar para compilar tu base de datos, archivos de medios, plugins, y temas en un archivo compacto.

  • Desempacar el archivo en la nueva ubicación o dominio con una función de “arrastrar y soltar” fácil de usar en el panel de WordPress de tu nuevo sitio web.


SiteGround Migrator es un plugin gratuito de WordPress desarrollado por SiteGround que nos ayuda a migrar un sitio web con WordPress a tu cuenta en SiteGround desde cualquier otra compañía de alojamiento web.


Para migrar un sitio web en WordPress con el plugin SiteGround Migrator, básicamente hay que realizar los siguientes pasos:

  • Generar un token de migración en el Site Tools de SiteGround.

  • Instalar el plugin SiteGround Migrator en tu WordPress.

  • Pegar el token de migración en el plugin para comenzar la migración.

  • Comprobar tu sitio y actualizar los registros DNS para terminar la migración.

courseDetails.title: Crea Correos Corporativos con Dominio Propio en Gmail 2026
courseDetails.shortDescription: Aprende a como crear correos corporativos con dominio propio en Gmail, de forma fácil y simple.
courseDetails.longDescription:
¿CUÁLES SON LAS VENTAJAS DE TENER CORREOS CORPORATIVOS PARA TU NEGOCIO?


Mejor imagen corporativa: Es la primera ventaja que surge de contar con un dominio propio. Le aporta seriedad, confianza y autoridad a tu marca ante tus clientes y proveedores.


De este modo, el dominio te ayuda a mostrar una imagen que refleje compromiso y confianza, y además es una forma de permitir que los usuarios identifiquen fácilmente tu negocio online.


Y es que no genera mucha confianza una empresa cuyo correo electrónico sea una cuenta de Gmail o de Outlook (Hotmail).


Comunicación más efectiva: Muchos emprendedores suelen mezclar las soluciones de comunicación efectivas con las que son de carácter gratuito.


Con esto nos referimos a que elegir una cuenta de correo electrónico gratuito significa quedar atado a ciertas características indeseables. Imaginemos que le enviamos una propuesta interesante a uno de nuestros mejores clientes. Es posible que, ese email termine perdido en la bandeja de Spam, por lo que se aumentan las probabilidades de que nunca sea abierto.


Un gran porcentaje de cuentas gratuitas se utiliza para hacer spam y tus mail pueden ser catalogados de la misma manera si son de cuentas gratuitas. Es un riesgo que no vale nada la pena.


Así pues, contar con un dominio propio hará que tus clientes reciban con seguridad todos tus emails con promociones e información que podría interesarles en su bandeja de entrada principal, por lo que no perderás ninguna oportunidad.


Mejor gestión de información y comunicación: Una de las mejores ventajas de contar con un dominio para los correos electrónicos de tu empresa, es que este te permite crear listas o grupos de trabajo. De este modo, tus colaboradores podrán comunicarse de una manera más sencilla y profesional, al mismo tiempo que aumentan el rendimiento del trabajo en equipo.


Garantiza tu privacidad: sino lo sabías, al crear una cuenta de email en una empresa como Google, debes aceptar obligatoriamente sus políticas de privacidad. Esto significa que Google tendrá acceso a tu información, por lo que esta será usada para mostrarte publicidad personalizada.


En cambio, con un dominio y servidor propio, tendrás la tranquilidad de mantener los datos y la información de tu empresa en buenas manos, pues tu empresa de hosting te garantiza no compartir esta información con terceros. Así, solo tu tendrás control absoluto de tu información.


Mayor seguridad de tus correos: al momento de gestionar una cuenta de correos esto es muy importante. Casi todos los servicios de correos corporativos tienen mayores medidas y protocolos de seguridad ante el posible hackeo o ataque a través de virus por terceros. Existen antivirus, firewalls y filtros anti-spam muy avanzados para proteger tu información confidencial, tus cuentas, dispositivos y equipos.


EN ESTE CURSO, APRENDERÁS:

  • Cómo obtener un dominio y hosting para crear tus correos corporativos con dominio propio.

  • Cómo conectar el dominio a tu plan de hosting para comenzar a crear tus correos corporativos con dominio propio.

  • Cómo crear una cuenta de correo corporativa con dominio propio.

  • Cómo crear una cuenta de correo electrónico en Gmail.

  • Cómo configurar tu correo corporativo con dominio propio en Gmail.

courseDetails.title: Hydroponics & Horticulture: Modern Farming Techniques 101
courseDetails.shortDescription: Build a DIY system, master nutrients, pH, system design, greenhouse operation & launch a business.
courseDetails.longDescription:
Are you tired of paying high prices for vegetables that lack freshness and flavor? Do you dream of harvesting crisp, clean, and delicious produce right from your own home, any day of the year, regardless of the season?


Welcome to the ultimate guide to the future of food! This comprehensive course unlocks the revolutionary world of Hydroponics, the science of growing plants without soil. Whether you have a spacious balcony or just a small corner in your apartment, this course will empower you to build a thriving garden that produces fresh, healthy food for your family.


Why Hydroponics is the Future (And Why You Must Learn It in 2025)

The world is changing, and so is the way we grow our food. Hydroponics isn't just a niche hobby; it's a critical solution to global challenges and a booming industry. Consider these powerful facts:


  • A Booming Global Market: The global hydroponics market is experiencing explosive growth, projected to soar past $25 Billion USD by 2030. Learning this skill now puts you at the forefront of a major agricultural revolution.

  • Incredible Water Efficiency: In a world concerned with water scarcity, hydroponics is a game-changer. It uses up to 90% less water than traditional soil-based agriculture, making it a profoundly sustainable practice.

  • Massive Yields & Faster Growth: Get more from less! Hydroponic systems can produce 3 to 10 times more food in the same amount of space. Plus, with direct nutrient delivery, plants can grow up to 50% faster than in soil.

  • The Ultimate Urban Solution: With urbanization on the rise globally, especially in cities like Sylhet, space is a premium. Hydroponics and vertical farming allow you to grow a significant amount of food on a tiny footprint—on a balcony, a rooftop, or even indoors.


A Journey Through Your Hydroponic Mastery

This isn't just a theory course; it's a practical, step-by-step blueprint for success. We'll take you on a complete journey, starting with the fundamentals of system design and choosing the right growing mediums. You'll quickly move on to the core of hydroponics: mastering water quality, mixing perfect nutrient solutions, and understanding plant biology to ensure a thriving garden. We then cover professional techniques for selecting the best plants, managing pests and diseases, and even operating a greenhouse for year-round harvests. Finally, we'll elevate your skills from a hobby to a potential profession, covering everything from harvesting and sustainable practices to the economics and step-by-step planning needed to launch your own hydroponics business.


From the biology of a single seed to the balance sheet of a commercial farm, this course leaves no stone unturned. We provide you with the knowledge, the practical skills, and the confidence to succeed in the exciting world of hydroponic horticulture.

Don't wait to gain control over your food supply and invest in a skill for the future. Enrol now and start your journey to becoming a hydroponics pro today!
targetAudiences: Absolute Beginners with no prior gardening experience.
Hobby Gardeners who want to upgrade their skills and grow food more efficiently.
Aspiring Entrepreneurs looking to start a profitable and sustainable hydroponics business.
Students and Educators interested in the future of agriculture and sustainable technology.
Anyone passionate about self-sufficiency, clean eating, and growing their own food.
